title: Short title
doc_html:
PART X-C. Family Child Care Provider and In-Home Provider Registration Law

§407.61. Short title

            This Part may be cited as the "Family Child Care Provider and In-Home Provider Registration Law".

            Acts 2014, No. 868, §3, eff. Feb. 1, 2015; Acts 2015, No. 354, §2, eff. July 1, 2015.
doc_text:
PART X-C.  Family Child Care Provider and In-Home Provider Registration Law
§407.61.  Short title
This Part may be cited as the "Family Child Care Provider and In-Home Provider
Registration Law".
Acts 2014, No. 868, §3, eff. Feb. 1, 2015; Acts 2015, No. 354, §2, eff. July 1, 2015.
